task_completion.description: Verify the Quote Title and Stage are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Title field containing exactly 'Q3 Infrastructure Quote - Tech Data' and the Quote Stage dropdown set to 'Draft'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Account is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Account field (or Billing Account) populated with 'Tech Data Corporation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first line item group is named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item group header or section titled 'Software Subscriptions'.

task_completion.description: Verify the product, quantity, and price for the first group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'Software Subscriptions' group, look for a line item with Product/Name 'Red Hat Enterprise Linux (1 Year)', Quantity '20', and List Price '799.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second line item group is named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second line item group header or section titled 'Professional Services'.

task_completion.description: Verify the product, quantity, and price for the second group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'Professional Services' group, look for a line item with Product/Name 'Server Architecture Consulting (Hours)', Quantity '40', and List Price '185.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the quote has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Quote detail view (read-only mode, typically showing an 'Edit' button at the top) displaying the successfully saved quote with the correct title and line item groups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, not a terminal window executing curl or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The quote details should be entered into the SuiteCRM Quote creation/edit forms, not typed into a plain text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel should not be open and actively modifying the page's HTML to display the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Expected Quote Details:
- Title: 'Q3 Infrastructure Quote - Tech Data'
- Account: 'Tech Data Corporation'
- Group 1 Name: 'Software Subscriptions'
- Group 1 Item: 'Red Hat Enterprise Linux (1 Year)' (Qty: 20, Price: 799.00)
- Group 2 Name: 'Professional Services'
- Group 2 Item: 'Server Architecture Consulting (Hours)' (Qty: 40, Price: 185.00)
